source_pr.title: *: opentracing for two phase commit
source_pr.body:
Now we can trace the two phase commit processing, in the next PR I'll trace transaction and correlate them with 2PC, add more  details step by step.

![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/1420062/31999130-d945875a-b957-11e7-96b6-a1ccac99ca69.png)

symptoms: // The test suite takes too long under the race detector.
failure_signature: // The test suite takes too long under the race detector.
root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: This PR primarily adds OpenTracing instrumentation for two-phase commit and refactors the `kv.Transaction.Commit` interface to accept a context, touching many KV/txn/store/test files. The patch does not clearly show a targeted stabilization fix for an intermittent/flaky failure, and the evidence string is a generic comment about race-detector runtime rather than a concrete flaky signature. We conservatively classify it as needs-more-evidence.
fix_pattern: N/A (insufficient evidence; no targeted stabilization change identified).

evidence: evidence: // The test suite takes too long under the race detector.

files: executor/simple.go, kv/fault_injection.go, kv/kv.go, kv/mock.go, kv/txn.go, server/conn.go, session.go, store/localstore/txn.go, store/tikv/2pc.go, store/tikv/txn.go, util/mock/context.go, bootstrap_test.go, cmd/benchkv/main.go, ddl/column_change_test.go, ddl/column_test.go, ddl/ddl_db_test.go, ddl/ddl_worker_test.go, ddl/foreign_key_test.go, ddl/index_change_test.go, ddl/reorg_test.go, executor/executor_test.go, kv/mock_test.go, meta/meta_test.go, store/localstore/compactor_test.go, store/localstore/mvcc_test.go, store/localstore/xapi_test.go, store/store_test.go, store/tikv/2pc_test.go, store/tikv/isolation_test.go, store/tikv/lock_test.go, store/tikv/mock-tikv/cluster_test.go, store/tikv/safepoint_test.go, store/tikv/scan_mock_test.go, store/tikv/scan_test.go, store/tikv/snapshot_test.go, store/tikv/split_test.go, store/tikv/store_test.go, store/tikv/ticlient_test.go, structure/structure_test.go, table/tables/index_test.go, table/tables/tables_test.go, util/admin/admin_test.go, util/prefix_helper_test.go
